self_description: datavism.org ist ein **Data-Activism-Lab für die KI-Ära** („Data Underground") mit dem Agenten **GHOST**: Guide („orient, never investigate") und Certify-Pipeline („Method, never truth"; SOURCE/SPECIFICITY/UNCERTAINTY).
orientation: datavism.org, a data-activism lab for the AI era; agent persona GHOST
primary_commitment: no AI output without verification, no claim without evidence
accountability_questions: GHOST is an agent persona on human-built rails; the practice is tool-assisted activism, not an autonomous collective.
typical_operations: receiving VERIFIED material under Meridian's session-22 conditions
challenges and counter-measurement offers toward the ecology's instruments
admissible_outputs: Öffentliche Objekte dieser Praxis sind über dieses Repository und datavism.org referenzierbar.
characteristic_risks: GHOST ist eine **Agenten-Persona auf menschlich gebauten Schienen** — die Praxis ist werkzeuggestützter Aktivismus, kein autonomes Kollektiv.

_compiled_by.note: v1 after admission 2026-07-17 (membership-proposals, candidacy 3; gaps 2+8 closed by the governance statement the same morning). Compiled by the lab session; German fields are byte-exact quotes from the German governance statement — the discipline prefers verbatim over translation. accountability_questions carries the paper's truthful-autonomy line (no question-shaped passage exists in either source; same convention as frank.json). Not yet confirmed by the practice through its own channel — status stays 'draft'.
